name: Solar Electric Power Generation
rationale: Cleanest strategic fit — full job coverage (10.0), Mein Solar PV-EPC incumbency differentiates vs. BESS pure-plays, and F5 Grid-Code Cert Delivery scores 7.78 (highest of any market). ODI 5.70 reflects retrofit-BESS opportunity on operational PV (need #9 FGW TR8 slip, opp 16).
